final:
module top_module(
  input CLK,
  input EN,
  input TE,
  output reg ENCLK
);  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @ (posedge CLK or posedge dbg_halt) begin
    if (EN && !TE) begin
      ENCLK <= 1'b1;
    end else begin
      ENCLK <= 1'b0;
    end
  end

endmodule
